# 3BOX AI

> 3BOX AI is a free AI-powered career operating system that helps job seekers build ATS-optimized resumes, find matching jobs, and auto-apply — all powered by 6 specialized AI agents. Built by OFORO AI.

## What 3BOX AI Does

3BOX AI automates the entire job search pipeline: Upload your resume → AI extracts and optimizes it → 6 AI agents find jobs, tailor your resume per job, write cover letters, and submit applications automatically. Users get 5 free applications per week on the free plan.

## Core Features

- **Free AI Resume Builder**: Build ATS-optimized resumes with 4 professional templates. AI enhances bullet points with metrics and action verbs. Export as PDF. No sign-up required for the free tool at https://3box.ai/tools/resume-builder
- **ATS Resume Checker**: Free tool to score your resume against Applicant Tracking Systems at https://3box.ai/tools/ats-checker
- **AI Cover Letter Generator**: Generate job-specific cover letters instantly at https://3box.ai/tools/cover-letter-generator
- **AI Career Coach (Cortex)**: Persistent AI coach that tracks your career goals, provides personalized advice, and predicts hire probability
- **AI Skill Assessment**: Adaptive testing with 30 questions (MCQ + scenarios), instant skill scoring, and gap analysis
- **AI Career Plan Generator**: Personalized career roadmaps with milestones, projects, and timeline estimates
- **Adaptive Learning Paths**: AI-curated courses, certifications, and projects that evolve with your progress
- **AI Job Matching**: Skills-based job matching with fit scores across 6+ job platforms
- **Automated Job Applications**: AI auto-apply with resume tailoring, cover letter generation, and multi-channel submission
- **AI Interview Prep**: Company-specific interview questions (technical, behavioral, role-specific)
- **AI Salary Estimator**: Market salary data for any role, location, and experience level at https://3box.ai/tools/salary-estimator
- **LinkedIn Optimization**: AI-generated headlines, posts, hashtags, and recommendation letters

## 6 AI Agents

1. **Scout** — Job discovery agent that searches 6+ platforms (LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, Google Jobs, etc.), scores matches, and detects scam postings
2. **Forge** — Resume optimization agent that tailors your resume per job with ATS keyword injection and scoring (0-100)
3. **Archer** — Application agent that generates cover letters, submits via ATS APIs (Greenhouse, Lever), email outreach, and browser extension
4. **Atlas** — Interview coaching agent with company-specific questions, practice scenarios, and JD analysis
5. **Sage** — Skill training agent with gap analysis, learning recommendations, and growth tracking
6. **Sentinel** — Quality review agent that scores applications (0-100), detects fabrication, and prevents spam

All 6 agents are available on every plan including free.

## 18 Free AI Tools (No Sign-Up Required)

1. ATS Resume Checker — https://3box.ai/tools/ats-checker
2. AI Resume Builder — https://3box.ai/tools/resume-builder

16. Thank You Email Generator — https://3box.ai/tools/thank-you-email-generator
17. AI Resume Generator — https://3box.ai/tools/resume-generator
18. Resume Enhancement — https://3box.ai/tools/resume-builder

## Pricing

- **Free ($0/month)**: 5 job applications per week, all AI features, all 6 agents, unlimited AI tool usage
- **Pro ($29/month or $290/year)**: 20 applications per day, all templates, job matching, interview prep, priority processing
- **Max ($59/month or $590/year)**: 50 applications per day, unlimited everything, priority support, advanced analytics

All plans use Claude Sonnet 4 AI model. Student discount: 30% off with .edu email.

## Industry-Specific Resume Builders

- Software Engineers: https://3box.ai/resume/software-engineer
- Data Scientists: https://3box.ai/resume/data-scientist
- Product Managers: https://3box.ai/resume/product-manager
- Marketing Professionals: https://3box.ai/resume/marketing
- Healthcare Professionals: https://3box.ai/resume/healthcare

## Comparisons

- 3BOX AI vs Jobscan: https://3box.ai/compare/jobscan
- 3BOX AI vs Teal: https://3box.ai/compare/teal
- 3BOX AI vs Rezi: https://3box.ai/compare/rezi
- All Comparisons: https://3box.ai/compare/all

## Technology

Built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js authentication, OpenRouter API (Claude Sonnet 4), Stripe billing, BullMQ + Redis queues, Cloudinary storage, and deployed on Hostinger VPS with PM2.

## Company

3BOX AI is a product of OFORO AI (https://oforo.ai). Founded to make AI-powered career tools accessible to everyone.
